content: hi everyone! I'm trying to move my project for the out of tree kernel module build into the Rust for Linux effort but I'd also like to maintain the previous code if anyone wants to do an out of tree build instead simply because I'm sure some people will still want that. I have a problem with Kbuild right now erroring on Ubuntu according to a user due to a lack of *.mod.c files for the files I'm building in the project Makefile. the object files handled by Kbuild seems to be just fine. is anyone here familiar enough with Kbuild to help me dig into this before I move to support for Rust in Linux as well?
Hi John -- I can take a look at it this weekend / next week.
that would be lovely! would the meeting Saturday be a good place to bring it up or would it be better to discuss with you over email?
It would be best over email next week for me.
For others that may also want to migrate existing modules or play with out-of-tree modules: see https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/rust-out-of-tree-module.
